chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5609 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 18-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. This petition is pending since 2019 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
